portfolio.intro: 这里收录我正在做和已经完成的项目。从最初的想法，到设计、搭建与迭代，它们记录了我如何把抽象的概念变成具体的结果。
portfolio.introEn: This is where I keep the projects I am building and the ones I have already finished. From the first idea to design, building, and iteration, they record how I turn abstract concepts into concrete outcomes.

thoughts.intro: 这里整理我持续关心的问题与观察。是观点，是方法，是哲学，是我试着把复杂事情讲清楚的过程。
thoughts.introEn: This is where I organize the questions and observations I keep returning to. It holds opinions, methods, philosophy, and my ongoing attempt to make complicated things easier to understand.

life.intro: 这里留下生活本身的痕迹，还有那些值得被记住一下的普通时刻。
life.introEn: This is where I leave traces of life itself, along with the ordinary moments that feel worth remembering for a little longer.

channel.intro: 这里连接我在不同平台上的持续表达。视频、笔记与日常更新会先在那里发生，再慢慢沉淀成这里的一部分。
channel.introEn: This page connects the places where I keep expressing myself across different platforms. Videos, notes, and everyday updates usually happen there first, and then gradually settle into this site over time.
